resources.string: Domoticz d anagraw domotik i sehlen,akkwen yeǧǧ att sfeqdem a tawila-m aṭas n wallalen
Tzemer-eḍ a ternuḍ ibenkan ɣer tafelwit ugensu s usekles n sen deg menyif.ssit mliḥ ɣef uferdis iw sekles n sen deg menyif!
Tzemer-eḍ att swel-eḍ agdil innek n asekkar deg iɣewwaren!
Tura tzemer-eḍ ad ṭefeḍ imnnaden deg wallal innek Android!bedel tiddin n imnnaden deg iɣewwaren
Tzemer-eḍ att swel-eḍ ugar n iseqddacen Domoticz deg iɣewwaren.
Tzemer-eḍ att swel-eḍ agdil innek n asekkar deg iɣewwaren!
Tzemer-eḍ att ssefru-ḍ isenfalen i tebɣiḍ att senqed-eḍ seg wallal innek n wanḥar Android!
Rmes imnnaden Domoticz srid ɣer wallal innek Android Auto!
Tzemer-eḍ att waliḍ udlif umezruy n uwulem,n wakud naɣ tazɣelt!
Tzemer-eḍ att tastay-eḍ ibenkan s waddad (tilḥin/aḥbas).sefqed tignit n umuɣ amnig srid iw astastay!
Tzemer-eḍ att sers-eḍ widgets deg agdil n umager
Tzemer-eḍ tura att sefeḍ-eḍ adhel agi seg umuɣ n iminig!
Tzemer-eḍ att sqluqel-eḍ isenfalen seg NFC!
You are able to toggle switches via Bluetooth connections!
Sqluqel isenfalen s taɣuri n tangalt QR (naɣ tangalt n tifeggagin)!
Senfel isnegziyen s taɣct innek!swel inezḍayen n taɣect seg wagdil n tawila ed isenfalen n tuqqna.
Toggle switches by scanning for beacons!
